lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਮਹਿ ਮਗਨ ਹੋਤ ਨ ਤੇਰੋ ਜਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taa meh magan hot na tero jan |2|
lines.english: Your humble servant is not engrossed in them. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਛੂਟਿਬੋ ਕਵਨ ਗੁਨ ॥੩॥੪॥
lines.translit: keh ravidaas chhoottibo kavan gun |3|4|
lines.english: Says Ravi Daas, what benefit would I get by escaping from it? ||3||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਕੀ ਜੇਵਰੀ ਬਾਧਿਓ ਤੇਰੋ ਜਨ ॥
lines.translit: prem kee jevaree baadhio tero jan |
lines.english: Your humble servant is tied by the rope of Your Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa |
lines.english: Aasaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਜਨ ਗਏ ਨਿਸਤਰਿ ਤਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har simarat jan ge nisatar tare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, the humble are carried across to salvation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har har har har har har hare |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, Har, Har, Har, Har, Haray.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਮਤ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਦੂਧੁ ਪੀਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nimat naamadeo doodh peeaeaa |
lines.english: Because of Naam Dayv's devotion, the Lord drank the milk he offered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਾਟੇ ਕਾਗਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke kaatte kaagar |1|
lines.english: The accounts of his past incarnations were torn up. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਕਬੀਰ ਉਜਾਗਰ ॥
lines.translit: har ke naam kabeer ujaagar |
lines.english: Through the Lord's Name, Kabeer became famous and respected.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਰਾਮ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jan ravidaas raam rang raataa |
lines.english: Servant Ravi Daas is imbued with the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਜਗ ਜਨਮ ਸੰਕਟ ਨਹੀ ਆਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tau jag janam sankatt nahee aaeaa |2|
lines.english: He shall not have to suffer the pains of reincarnation into the world again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਟੀ ਕੋ ਪੁਤਰਾ ਕੈਸੇ ਨਚਤੁ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: maattee ko putaraa kaise nachat hai |
lines.english: How does the puppet of clay dance?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਉ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਨਰਕ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਤਾ ॥੩॥੫॥
lines.translit: eiau gur parasaad narak nahee jaataa |3|5|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, he shall not have to go to hell. ||3||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖੈ ਦੇਖੈ ਸੁਨੈ ਬੋਲੈ ਦਉਰਿਓ ਫਿਰਤੁ ਹੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dekhai dekhai sunai bolai daurio firat hai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He looks and listens, hears and speaks, and runs around. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਗਈ ਤਬ ਰੋਵਨੁ ਲਗਤੁ ਹੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: maaeaa gee tab rovan lagat hai |1|
lines.english: But when his wealth is gone, then he cries and bewails. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਕਛੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਤਬ ਗਰਬੁ ਕਰਤੁ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: jab kachh paavai tab garab karat hai |
lines.english: When he acquires something, he is inflated with ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਸਿ ਗਇਆ ਜਾਇ ਕਹੂੰ ਸਮਾਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: binas geaa jaae kahoon samaanaa |2|
lines.english: When he dies, no one knows where he has gone. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਬਾਜੀ ਜਗੁ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: keh ravidaas baajee jag bhaaee |
lines.english: Says Ravi Daas, the world is just a dramatic play, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਬਚ ਕ੍ਰਮ ਰਸ ਕਸਹਿ ਲੁਭਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: man bach kram ras kaseh lubhaanaa |
lines.english: In thought, word and deed, he is attached to the sweet and tangy flavors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਜੀਗਰ ਸਉ ਮੋੁਹਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਬਨਿ ਆਈ ॥੩॥੬॥
lines.translit: baajeegar sau mouhi preet ban aaee |3|6|
lines.english: I have enshrined love for the Lord, the star of the show. ||3||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਧੰਨੇ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa baanee bhagat dhane jee kee |
lines.english: Aasaa, The Word Of Devotee Dhanna Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮਤ ਫਿਰਤ ਬਹੁ ਜਨਮ ਬਿਲਾਨੇ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਧੀਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhramat firat bahu janam bilaane tan man dhan nahee dheere |
lines.english: I wandered through countless incarnations, but mind, body and wealth never remain stable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਚ ਬਿਖੁ ਕਾਮ ਲੁਬਧ ਰਾਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਬਿਸਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹੀਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: laalach bikh kaam lubadh raataa man bisare prabh heere |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Attached to, and stained by the poisons of sexual desire and greed, the mind has forgotten the jewel of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨ ਤੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਬਢੀ ਅਨ ਭਾਂਤੀ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਫਿਰਿ ਤਾਨਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gun te preet badtee an bhaantee janam maran fir taaniaa |1|
lines.english: Turning away from virtue, his love for other things increases, and he weaves again the web of birth and death. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਫਲ ਮੀਠ ਲਗੇ ਮਨ ਬਉਰੇ ਚਾਰ ਬਿਚਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bikh fal meetth lage man baure chaar bichaar na jaaniaa |
lines.english: The poisonous fruit seems sweet to the demented mind, which does not know the difference between good and evil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਤਿ ਜਾਨਿ ਨਹੀ ਰਿਦੈ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਜਲਤ ਜਾਲ ਜਮ ਫੰਧ ਪਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jugat jaan nahee ridai nivaasee jalat jaal jam fandh pare |
lines.english: He does not know the way to the Lord, who dwells within his heart; burning in the trap, he is caught by the noose of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਪ੍ਰਵੇਸੁ ਗੁਰਹਿ ਧਨੁ ਦੀਆ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਮਾਨੁ ਮਨ ਏਕ ਮਏ ॥
lines.translit: giaan praves gureh dhan deea dhiaan maan man ek me |
lines.english: The Guru has given the wealth of spiritual wisdom; practicing meditation, the mind becomes one with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਫਲ ਸੰਚਿ ਭਰੇ ਮਨ ਐਸੇ ਪਰਮ ਪੁਰਖ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਨ ਬਿਸਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bikh fal sanch bhare man aise param purakh prabh man bisare |2|
lines.english: Gathering the poisonous fruits, he fills his mind with them, and he forgets God, the Supreme Being, from his mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਇ ਸਮਾਨੀ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਅਛਲੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਹਿਚਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jot samaae samaanee jaa kai achhalee prabh pahichaaniaa |
lines.english: One who is filled with the Divine Light, recognizes the undeceivable Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਮਾਨੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਜਾਨਿਆ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਨੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਭਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: prem bhagat maanee sukh jaaniaa tripat aghaane mukat bhe |3|
lines.english: Embracing loving devotional worship for the Lord, I have come to know peace; satisfied and satiated, I have been liberated. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੈ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਧਰਣੀਧਰੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਜਨ ਸੰਤ ਸਮਾਨਿਆ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhanai dhan paaeaa dharaneedhar mil jan sant samaaniaa |4|1|
lines.english: Dhanna has obtained the Lord, the Sustainer of the World, as his wealth; meeting the humble Saints, he merges in the Lord. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਮਨੁ ਲੀਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: gobind gobind gobind sang naamadeo man leenaa |
lines.english: Naam Dayv's mind was absorbed into God, Gobind, Gobind, Gobind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਢ ਦਾਮ ਕੋ ਛੀਪਰੋ ਹੋਇਓ ਲਾਖੀਣਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aadt daam ko chheeparo hoeo laakheenaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The calico-printer, worth half a shell, became worth millions. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੁਨਨਾ ਤਨਨਾ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਕੈ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਚਰਨ ਕਬੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bunanaa tananaa tiaag kai preet charan kabeeraa |
lines.english: Abandoning weaving and stretching thread, Kabeer enshrined love for the Lord's lotus feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਚ ਕੁਲਾ ਜੋਲਾਹਰਾ ਭਇਓ ਗੁਨੀਯ ਗਹੀਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: neech kulaa jolaaharaa bheo guneey gaheeraa |1|
lines.english: A weaver from a lowly family, he became an ocean of excellence. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਆ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: paragatt hoaa saadhasang har darasan paaeaa |2|
lines.english: He became famous in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and obtained the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿਦਾਸੁ ਢੁਵੰਤਾ ਢੋਰ ਨੀਤਿ ਤਿਨਿ ਤਿਆਗੀ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ravidaas dtuvantaa dtor neet tin tiaagee maaeaa |
lines.english: Ravi Daas, who used to carry dead cows every day, renounced the world of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੇ ਵਸਿਆ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਭਗਤਾ ਮਹਿ ਗਨਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: hirade vasiaa paarabraham bhagataa meh ganiaa |3|
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God dwelled in his heart, and he was counted among the devotees. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੈਨੁ ਨਾਈ ਬੁਤਕਾਰੀਆ ਓਹੁ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਸੁਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sain naaee butakaareea ohu ghar ghar suniaa |
lines.english: Sain, the barber, the village drudge, became famous in each and every house.
